name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Bakersfield, CA's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 308 H St offers quick car title loans with same-day funding for qualified borrowers.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans operates a dedicated storefront at 308 H St in Bakersfield, CA. This Bakersfield location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, with Saturday hours from 10AM to 5PM. The store is conveniently located for walk-in customers throughout the Bakersfield area who need quick access to title-secured lending.

At this Bakersfield, CA branch, Montana Capital Car Title Loans specializes in car title loans for borrowers with urgent cash needs. The 308 H St location offers same-day funding when you bring your vehicle title, proof of income, and valid ID. For detailed loan terms, fees, and eligibility, contact this location directly at 661-220-7090.

Whether you're facing an unexpected expense or need cash fast, this Bakersfield storefront provides a straightforward title-lending solution. Bring your current vehicle registration, valid government ID, and proof of residence. Montana Capital Car Title Loans offers flexible repayment options designed for Bakersfield's working families.
pros: Loan amounts up to $50,000 based on vehicle equity, well above typical title loan caps
Same-day funding available — funds disbursed within 24 hours of approval
No credit check required; bad credit and prior bankruptcies explicitly accepted
Borrower keeps driving their car throughout the entire repayment period
Free pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit score impact
In operation since 2007 with over 375,000 reported customers served
4.5 Google rating with reviewers citing fast processing and helpful staff
cons: No APR, fee, or representative loan cost information disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle title is collateral — failure to repay risks repossession of the borrower's car
Funds disbursed as a Bank of America check, not instant cash, per customer review
Only 59 Google reviews for a lender claiming 375,000+ customers raises verification concerns
Title loans are inherently high-cost products; no low-APR alternatives or warnings provided
best_for: Car owners with poor or no credit who need emergency funds quickly
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional lenders or banks
People with significant vehicle equity and a paid-off or nearly paid-off car
Those needing amounts larger than a typical payday loan but unable to qualify for personal loans
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for car owners with poor credit or bankruptcy history who need fast cash and have no lower-cost options available. The central caveat is that no interest rates or fees are disclosed on the website, and title loans as a product category typically carry triple-digit APRs — borrowers must obtain and review full loan terms before committing, as defaulting means losing their vehicle.
services: Free pre-approval with no credit score impact
In-person check pickup at physical locations
Flexible repayment plans based on borrower needs
Title return upon final loan payment
meta_description: Bakersfield, CA Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 308 H St. Same-day car title loans with flexible repayment options.
